titleStmt.title: SII 4.1288: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1288. (A.R. No. 379 of 1893). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cōḍa samastarājāśraya jēṁdra vīramahēṁdra pikramacoḍa vijayābharaṇa kēsariva¨rmmape¨rmmā
galu gaṁggākāvērīpa¨ryyaṁtaṁ saptamō viṣṇuva¨rddhanulaina tribhuvanacakrava¨rtti śrīkulōttuṁggacōḍadēvara prava¨rddhamānavijayarājya divyasaṁvatsa 36
gaṁgagoṇḍacōḍavalanāṇṭi guddavādināṁṭi peddaḍākarēmi śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvarakuṁ jōḍamaṇḍalamuna tiruviṁddalūrunāṇṭi gaṁja paṁccanadi muḍigoṇḍa
vatsarāyaru guddavādināṁṭi kaḍulanāṁṭi duggūdiki raṭṭaḍikamu muṁdaṭi raṭṭaḍlu śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvara pariyalamuna sōmāṇḍiAyina śrīkaraṇa māṇikamu koḍuku
kuḍiyaṇḍunuṁ . gāmāsāni koḍuku gāpiraṭṭaḍicēta niruvadi rājarājamāḍalu vaṭṭi Alamuvalayu cuṭṭu Iruvadivuṭlunēla catussīmamulatōgūḍa salvi saṁpada
śēṣalōpugā vilcikoni śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvarakuṟepaṭi saṁdhyamaṁ trabōnamunappaṭikiṁ biṭṭamudunakuṁ dellaṁbrālakuṁccamu liruvayenunu Amudupaḍi
dēvara kilaramunaṁ brōlabrōla nāvani yaḍapuna nē māna 1 . vīriḍcina surabhulu 35 nunu Iddēvara sannithānamuna tī¨rttamukaṟutaṁ guḍuvaṁgala śivayōgulu
duṇḍraku bērokkanikiṁ badiyenmidiyaina ḍaṁguṁbrāla kuṁccamula 9 śivayōgulu yai nityapūjakulu pēru yokkoṁṭiki ḍaṁguprāla ku 1 mā 3 ṇḍukā paḍlu 10 ṇṭi
ki prāla ku 15 dīniki pappunaku prā ku 1 ṇṭi nēmāna 1 nu jallakuṁcaḍla kuṁcca 3 nuppunakū vaḍla ma 3 nu naṁjuḍlu 3 ṇṭiki vaḍlaku 3 nu vaḍladaṁccudāniki
māḍa 1 nu vaḍla kha 13 nu kaṟṟalu veṭṭuvāniki jīvitamā 1 nu vaḍla kha 13 nu vaṇḍuvāniki jīvita ci 5 nu vaḍla kha 1 nu nākulu veṭṭuvāniki jīvita ci 3 nu ka
peddakummari jīvita ci 5 nu vaḍla kha 6 nuṁ gā śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvara sannidhānamuna nicci pērokkaṇṭiki ḍaṁguprala ku 1 mā 2 ṇḍu gā peḍlu 10 ṇṭiki prāla ku 15
pappuna ku 1 śivayōgulupaduḍraku vaḍlu ḍaṁcceḍu Āṇḍadi yokkatte piṭṭamudunaku vaḍluḍaṁcceḍu Āṇḍuvaṇḍru yidaṟuṁgā muvyuriku śilāśāsanamu veṭṭi
peddaceṟuvulōpugā dīniki khāṟṟeninēla paḍu maṭi pe likhitaṁ ḍakarēmi sūrācariAyina rājēṁdracōḍaAcari .
Digital edition of SII 4.1288 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
